name.description: Record name relative to the zone apex. Use '@' for the apex itself.

priority.description: Priority value for MX and SRV records.

main.description: Record containing the DNS zone entries for a domain managed by Marque. The record key matches the corresponding at.marque.domain record key (the FQDN).

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was last written.

domain.description: Fully qualified domain name this zone belongs to. Denormalized from the subject record so consumers can read the FQDN without resolving the reference.

records.description: The DNS resource records in this zone.

subject.description: Strong reference to the at.marque.domain record this zone belongs to.

description: DNS zone records for a domain where Marque handles the nameservers. Stored in the user's repository.
